action: Inbox lifecycle foolproofing — Layer 1 idempotency-via-git + Layer 2 3-state lifecycle (inbox/→processing/→processed/|rejected/) + Layer 2.5 crash recovery
operator_note: Closes the c32-inbox-injection bug: Triage ingests but never moves files aside, so shipped tasks (e.g. c33-watchdog-mvp shipped in a543105) get re-ingested on next cycle. Root cause is unbuilt lifecycle - persona instructions say 'move to processed/cycle-N/' but Triage's profile disallows Bash(mv:*), and no script implements the move. Scope (5 files, ~370 LoC, single-writer, FULL three-layer foolproofing in one cycle per operator decision): (1) scripts/utility/inbox-mover.sh NEW ~170 LoC - atomic transitions: 'claim <id> <cycle>' moves inbox/ → processing/cycle-N/; 'promote <id> <state> [<cycle>] [--commit-sha SHA]' moves processing/ → processed/|rejected/|retry/; 'recover-orphans' scans processing/cycle-X/ where X is not in cycle-state.json:lastCycleNumber, moves back to inbox/. All operations atomic via single 'mv', bash 3.2 compliant, ledger entry on every transition with class=inbox-lifecycle. (2) agents/evolve-triage.md MODIFY +60 LoC - add Step 0a 'Idempotency skip-list' BEFORE existing Step 0 validation. For each .evolve/inbox/*.json: CHECK1 git log --grep='^feat: cycle [0-9]+ — ${id}(:| )' --format=%H main, if match → record_skip_shipped; CHECK2 find rejected/ -name *id* → record_skip_rejected; CHECK3 jq count of failedApproaches[] where classification matches code-(build|audit)-fail, if >=2 → record_escalate_block. Emit skip_shipped[]/skip_rejected[]/escalate_block[] arrays into triage-decision.json. Step 0 itself adds 'claim' invocation. (3) scripts/lifecycle/ship.sh MODIFY +50 LoC - post-commit hook reads triage-decision.json, iterates top_n[]+skip_shipped[], calls inbox-mover.sh promote ... processed <CYCLE> --commit-sha <SHA>. mv failure logs WARN to ledger but does NOT block ship (Layer 1 catches residual next cycle). (4) scripts/dispatch/evolve-loop-dispatch.sh MODIFY +20 LoC - startup hook invokes 'bash inbox-mover.sh recover-orphans' after preflight before first cycle; idempotent and safe to run every invocation. (5) scripts/tests/inbox-lifecycle-test.sh NEW ~120 LoC - 7 scenarios: fresh-inject→claim→ship→processed; dupe-of-shipped→skip-shipped+moved; malformed→rejected; mv-failure→WARN+ship-rc=0+Layer1-catches; multi-project isolation; crash-recovery (orphan in processing/cycle-99/, no active 99 → back to inbox/); race-safety (orphan in processing/cycle-X/, X IS active → NOT moved). Profile additions: .evolve/profiles/triage.json gets Bash(inbox-mover.sh claim:*); ship.sh inherits Bash(inbox-mover.sh promote:*); dispatcher gets Bash(inbox-mover.sh recover-orphans:*). FOOLPROOF principle: git is single source of truth, filesystem dirs are housekeeping. Even if Layer 2 mv fails completely, Layer 1 idempotency catches re-ingestion. OPERATOR PRE-CLEANED: c33's stale file already moved to .evolve/inbox/processed/cycle-29/a543105-2026-05-13T00-18-49Z-718106e7.json — cycle building c37 will not encounter the stale c33 file.
